query:
SELECT p.id AS product_id,
       p.productCode,
       p.batchNo,
       p.serialNumber,
       p.imei,
       p.stationCode,
       p.productStatus,
       b.id AS b_task_id,
       b.stationTaskStatus AS b_task_status,
       b.completedAt AS b_completed_at,
       b.metadata AS b_metadata,
       c.id AS c_task_id,
       c.stationTaskStatus AS c_task_status,
       c.completedAt AS c_completed_at,
       c.metadata AS c_metadata
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN station_tasks b ON b.productId = p.id AND b.stationCode = 'B'
LEFT JOIN station_tasks c ON c.productId = p.id AND c.stationCode = 'C'
WHERE p.batchNo = '00500024970' AND p.archivedAt IS NULL;
command:

       p.productCode,
       p.batchNo,
       p.serialNumber,
       p.imei,
       p.stationCode,
       p.productStatus,
       b.id AS b_task_id,
       b.stationTaskStatus AS b_task_status,
       b.completedAt AS b_completed_at,
       b.metadata AS b_metadata,
       c.id AS c_task_id,
       c.stationTaskStatus AS c_task_status,
       c.completedAt AS c_completed_at,
       c.metadata AS c_metadata
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN station_tasks b ON b.productId = p.id AND b.stationCode = 'B'
LEFT JOIN station_tasks c ON c.productId = p.id AND c.stationCode = 'C'
WHERE p.batchNo = '00500024970' AND p.archivedAt IS NULL;
